taunts: You know, I envy the substrates. How are they so solitary without the loneliness?
In the likely event that I break your wand, sword, staff, mace, or other sub-par magical object, feel free to visit my artifact shop after the match.
Just a little something I learned in Minneapolis...
The orbs of disorder are not yours to know. Honestly, I'm only pretending that I know what they're doing half the time...
